work_item.description: Architecture state machine: a rejected/vetoed ADR must NOT complete the work item. Current behavior (observed 2026-06-12, events seq 12-13): adr_decided(accepted=false) immediately emits work_item_completed, wedging the item — the revised ADR resubmission (seq 15) was accepted as adr_drafted against a completed item and orphaned with no review gate ever scheduled. Required behavior: on rejection of completeness, loop back to drafting (like TDD gates); on final human rejection of the decision, record the ADR as Rejected in the registry (rejected decisions are kept as history, never deleted) and complete the item. Additionally cf_adr_submit must reject submissions against completed work items.
